body.title: Create /opentickets skill — list open tickets via script
body.result: /opentickets skill: calls cc_queue list, groups by status, optional status filter, summary count line
body.description:
The /opentickets skill should call a script that lists all open/pending/sprint tickets from cc_queue.py, formatted the same way CC currently does it manually. Eliminates ad-hoc queue queries each session.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/opentickets/SKILL.md (new), lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (read-only, no changes)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** skill calls cc_queue.py list, filters to non-closed, groups by status. No queue modifications.
**Test plan:** invoke /opentickets and verify output matches cc_queue.py list filtered output
